title: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
summary:
Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
Princeton, NJ | Full-Time, Direct Hire | 2 days a week onsite

Join a highly stable and growing technology team supporting mission-critical systems within a leading financial services organization. This is a hands-on senior engineering role where you'll help design, build, and modernize enterprise applications that directly support trading, operations, business intelligence, finance, and other core business functions.

With exceptional employee retention, a collaborative engineering culture, and significant investment in cloud modernization, this is an opportunity to make a measurable impact while working with modern technologies including Angular, Spring Boot, Microservices, and AWS.

What You'll Be Doing
Design, develop, and maintain scalable full stac
requirements: Develop high-performance web applications using Angular and Java
Create and execute unit, integration, and end-to-end testing strategies
Support ongoing cloud migration initiatives from on-premise environments to AWS
Collaborate with engineering teams in a fast-paced, highly technical environment
Must be authorized to work in the United States without sponsorship
Must be able to work onsite in Princeton, NJ two days per week
No third-party candidates or C2C arrangements
preferred_qualifications: AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform
Financial services or trading systems experience
